---
title: "PuMP: SUBSONIC HYDRA"
mainfont: Special Elite
---

__BACKGROUND__ <br>
H

__PHYSICAL FEATURES__ <br>
__:__ 

__PERSONALITY QUIRKS__ <br>
__X but Y:__  <br>
__Quick yet spaced-out:__ He is a very active and fit person. He's exceptional in action. 
Unfortunately he has a bad tendency to day dream when not much is going on.
Probably a form of energy conservation.

__FAVOURED GEAR__

- 
- 
- 

__PRIMAL STATS__ <br>
JAWS: | EYES:| LIMBS: | NERVES:

__PRIMAL ABILITIES__ <br>
__A:__ <br>
__B:__
